name: QNI : Confidential Content Being Transferred
notes:
This rule detects confidential content that is being transferred to a remote destination. 
Note that Suspect Content can be tuned with YARA rules, please refer to QNI documentation.
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match confidential content
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Confidential Content Being Transferred on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match confidential content
RED_list: Event name: Confidential Content Being Transferred
Event description: Confidential content detected in outbound transfers.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
